insights.title: Insights & Recommendations
insights.lowCalories: Low calorie intake today. Make sure to eat enough!
insights.highCalories: Higher calorie day. Consider lighter meals tomorrow.
insights.lowProtein: Consider adding more protein to your meals.
insights.fewMeals: Only {{count}} meal(s) logged. Try not to skip meals.
insights.logMore: Try to log more meals for better tracking.
insights.keepLogging: Keep logging your meals for more insights!

periodDescriptions.day: Rule-based findings and summary for the selected day.
periodDescriptions.week: Average intake review for the selected week.
periodDescriptions.month: Longer trend review for the selected month.

reports.detailPlaceholder: Select a generated report to open it.
reports.detailEmpty: Open a saved report from the list to see its full content.
reports.noFlags: No nutrient flags were raised for this period.
reports.narrativeEmpty: No narrative summary is available for this period.
reports.nutrientTotalsEmpty: No nutrient totals were returned for this period.
reports.healthContextEmpty: No health context was applied to this report.

placeholder.waitingMessage: This period does not have a persisted report yet. Please check back later.
placeholder.noMealsTitle: No logged meals for this period
placeholder.noMealsMessage: There were no logged meals in this period, so no persisted report is available.

loggingCoverage.missingDays: Some days were not logged for this period. The report may be less accurate.
loggingCoverage.missingWeeks: Some weeks were not logged: {{weeks}}. The report may be less accurate.

reports.empty: No report data is available for this period yet.

errors.loadCurrent: Failed to load the current report.
errors.loadDetail: Failed to load this generated report.
